query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(DISTINCT v.id) as total_vendedores,
  SUM(vd.valorTotal) / 100 as total_vendido,
  AVG(vd.valorTotal) / 100 as ticket_medio,
  COUNT(vd.id) as total_vendas
FROM vendedores v
LEFT JOIN vendas_diarias vd ON v.id = vd.vendedorId 
  AND vd.mes = 'Novembro/2025'
WHERE v.metaTrimestral > 0;
